commands.name: toggle-pihole
commands.title: Toggle Pi-Hole
commands.subtitle: Pie for Pi-hole
commands.description: Enable or disable your Pi-Hole, for any custom time

commands.name: query-log
commands.title: Query Log
commands.subtitle: Pie for Pi-hole
commands.description: View query logs with time range and status filtering.

commands.name: get-summary
commands.title: Pi-Hole Dashboard
commands.subtitle: Pie for Pi-hole
commands.description: View Pi-hole dashboard with stats, query types, and system info.

commands.name: top-queries
commands.title: Top Queries
commands.subtitle: Pie for Pi-hole
commands.description: View top allowed and blocked queries.

commands.name: clients-devices
commands.title: Clients & Devices
commands.subtitle: Pie for Pi-hole
commands.description: View top clients and network devices.

commands.name: manage-domains
commands.title: Manage Domains
commands.subtitle: Pie for Pi-hole
commands.description: View, add, and delete domains on your allowlist or blocklist.

commands.name: add-domain
commands.title: Add Domain
commands.subtitle: Pie for Pi-hole
commands.description: Quickly add domains to your allowlist or blocklist.

commands.name: subscription-lists
commands.title: Manage Subscription Lists
commands.subtitle: Pie for Pi-hole
commands.description: View, add, toggle, and delete subscription lists (v6 only).

commands.name: add-list
commands.title: Add Subscription List
commands.subtitle: Pie for Pi-hole
commands.description: Quickly add a subscription list to Pi-hole (v6 only).

commands.name: check-domain
commands.title: Check Domain
commands.subtitle: Pie for Pi-hole
commands.description: Search if a domain is blocked or allowed (v6 only).

commands.name: teleporter-backup
commands.title: Backup Config
commands.subtitle: Pie for Pi-hole
commands.description: Download a Pi-hole Teleporter backup (v6 only).

commands.name: manage-groups-clients
commands.title: Groups & Clients
commands.subtitle: Pie for Pi-hole
commands.description: Manage groups and configured clients (v6 only).

commands.name: view-config
commands.title: View Configuration
commands.subtitle: Pie for Pi-hole
commands.description: View full Pi-hole configuration as JSON (v6 only).

preferences.name: PIHOLE_URL
preferences.title: Pi-hole URL
preferences.description: IP address or hostname (e.g. 192.168.1.2 or pi.hole). v6 defaults to HTTPS; prefix with http:// to override.

preferences.name: API_TOKEN
preferences.title: API Token / Password
preferences.description: For v5: API token (Settings > API > Show API Token). For v6: your password or an app password.

preferences.name: TOTP_SECRET
preferences.title: TOTP Secret (v6 only)
preferences.description: Base32 TOTP secret for 2FA. Leave empty if 2FA is disabled or you use an app password.
